message:
refactor(cli): remove deprecated metadata commands from utilities

Removes tag suggestion and related metadata assistant commands from
utilities.ts as they were moved to the dedicated metadata-assistant
module in a previous commit.

Changes:
- utilities.ts: Remove tagsSuggestCommand and formatSimilarityLine
  (148 lines removed - now in metadata-assistant.ts)
- cost.ts: Minor type annotation fix
- premium-packs.ts: Small formatting improvement

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
